description_short: Analyze threat models, track scenarios, controls, attack events, and identify defense gaps.
description_long: Comprehensive threat modeling tool that supports: (1) AI-powered analysis of threat model documents and tabletop exercise minutes, (2) threat scenario creation and tracking with security controls and attack sequence events, (3) defense-in-depth gap analysis identifying unprotected steps, weak controls, and easy bypasses, (4) markdown export of scenario reports. Integrates threat intelligence context for enriched analysis. Maps to MITRE ATT&CK techniques.
author: Event Mill Contributors
